pages.text: The Forest Island writ large — radius 13–17, a deeper core, more coal and iron to match its size. Like the small one it takes after the biome it lands in: a grove of trees over forest (oak, birch, spruce, and the rest), open grass over plains, or a treeless dirt-and-sand patch over a desert.$(br2)Crafted from any logs — any tree — so harvest a tree first.
